source: Verified empirically on-device (torch.cuda.get_device_name + torch.cuda.get_device_properties, 2026-06-05) + project memory project_kernel_optimization.md; consumer Blackwell has NO TMA pipeline so num_stages>1 is unusable (distinct from B200/SM100).

specs.notes: fused_cca_prologue AND fused_hyper_connection use NO explicit shared memory (register-resident: D=32 for cca; n=4 streams x C=768 carrier row tiled into one BLOCK_C register block for HC). Bank-conflict freedom is therefore VACUOUSLY TRUE (no smem allocated); coalescing of the C-contiguous / n*C-contiguous global accesses is the relevant memory property. Occupancy fields queried live: shared_per_mp=102400, max_threads_per_mp=1536 (48 warps/SM), regs 64K/SM.
